cdn-hosts-workaround.note: Community handles CDN workaround via /etc/hosts, upstream fix in librespot #1722

picoreplayer-bootlocal.note: piCorePlayer persistence — community helps each other

sha-mismatch-install-loop.note: repo.xml SHA was wrong for v2.3.1, fixed in v2.3.2+. CJS and Andy_NO affected.

loud-distorted-playback.note: Volume normalization was a no-op. Fixed in v2.3.8. Awaiting confirmation from plasticator2 (post #148).

pcp-update-loop.note: Andy_NO: pCP v11.1.0 update checkbox resets after restart. Likely overlay-FS persistence. CJS helping (posts #146-147).

shuffleindex-crash.note: Fixed in v2.1.3 — streamingSongIndex replaces non-existent shuffleIndex

docker-mdns-port-conflict.note: tontze: TrueNAS Docker, port 5353 EADDRINUSE blocks mDNS discovery. Related to #60.

new-account-no-stored-credentials.note: New Spotify account (Oct 2025) cannot play on Squeezebox Boom. Known librespot upstream issue with new accounts. Community (urknall + CJS) diagnosed correctly. No maintainer action needed. v3.0 PKCE will bypass ZeroConf bootstrap and may solve this class of issue.

auth-architecture-discussion.note: Multi-post architecture discussion. urknall proposed staged hybrid approach (#153-155), sti replied with spike results (#156), urknall responded with go-librespot study guide + sp_dc warning (#158), sti posted final architecture decisions + go-librespot evaluation question (#175). Waiting for urknall response.

ogg-normalization-passthrough.note: CJS asked about OGG passthrough + replay gain. Explained Spotify proprietary format. Future fix via JSON-RPC gain passthrough on backlog.
